previewPasswordLocation: Apple Passwords, shared group "Rare Pond", entry "Rare Pond Color Looks". (Master copy: Cloudflare > Pages > rare-pond-studios > Settings > Variables and secrets > COLORLOOKS_PASSWORD)

looks.name: Rare Pond Signature
looks.note: The site-wide gradient: bubble glows and shared gradients. Color 1/2/3 are the three gradient stops.

looks.name: Rainbow (locked)
looks.note: Not three colors. The animated rainbow gradient built into the site. Nothing here is editable; it is listed so other places can point at it.
